instruction: Pick up the bottle behind the bowl.
Pick up the can to the left of the box.
Pick up the ball to the right of the banana.
Pick up the can behind the box.
First move away the bottle in front, then take out the bowl.
Put all boxes on the left, and put bottles and cans on the right.
Put all block-like objects into the tray.
Arrange all boxes in a line.
Put cylinders on the right and cuboids on the left.
Put all containers into the tray.
Put three bottle-or-can objects into the tray.
